feedback.text: I think your idea about controlling and announcing software that uses dark patterns and especially has gambling mechanics available to children (especially games) would be a great idea, the creators often benefit a lot from these markets and they are often harmful to the consumer. It would be great also if you would add games to that, games also need controlling since many of them are often made with the intention of making as much money, only to be abandoned with the players being unable to even play them sometimes, then making another game with it being very similar to the last one just to make more money. I would really like to be informed of such tactics used by these game companies and for it to be regulated since often these games have gambling mechanics too, which is available to minors and these minors often end up with actual gambling addictions, spending thousands of euro hoping to get their favourite character "skin".
